Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Per Ccp 438; Lack Of Standing; Lack Of Privity
Off Calendar Jun-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ALAN CHAN and SPORTS TREND, INC.'s Motion For Judgemnt On The Pleadings Per Ccp 438 is DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges standing to sue for breach of contract covering lease for premises 9/1/07-8/31/12. Contracts attached to RJN cover other periods. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)
